Package com.example.vigilante

package com.example.vigilante
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AddEvent
    This class helps an organizer to add new events
    AddEventTest
     
    AdminPage
    This class is used to view the AdminPage when admin logs in which is different than other user's homepage
    AdminPageTest
     
    AllEventsActivity
    This class is called to show all the events available in in firebase
    AllEventsActivityTest
     
    AllProfiles
    This class is used to pull all the profiles registered in firebase
    Entrant
     
    EntrantAdapter
     
    EntrantMapActivity
     
    EntrantTest
     
    Event
    This class is used to create a Event object which is used by other classes such as addEvent and AllEventActivity to grab data
    EventAdapter
    This class is the engine for event class it uses event class to show the user all the events and options
    EventAdapter.EventViewHolder
    This class is a RecyclerView which holds and views our events
    EventCreatedActivity
     
    EventDetailActivity
    This class allows user to view event by scanning a qr code from their homescreen
    EventTest
     
    ExampleInstrumentedTest
    Instrumented test, which will execute on an Android device.
    ExampleUnitTest
    Example local unit test, which will execute on the development machine (host).
    HomePage
    This class shows the home page to our user, it has the option to scan qr goto events or profile page.
    LoginTest
     
    LotteryInfoActivity
     
    MainActivity
    This is the class which allows us to log in our app once logged it, it remember the device
    MainActivityTest
     
    Profile
    This class is what creates a profile for a user.
    ProfileAdapter
    This class is the engine function for the profiles, it grabs the profiles from firebase and views it to the user
    ProfileAdapter.ProfileViewHolder
    This function holds the profiles in the recylerview and shows it to the user.
    ProfilePage
    This class is for the profile page it shows the user information , sign out button , and if user is organizer add and my events.
    ProfileTest
     
    RegisterPage
    This class is the page for the registration page , it take necessary user info to create account and auto signs in.
    RegisterPageTest
     
    RegisterTest
     
    RegistrationTest
     
    viewAttendee
    This class helps organizer see differents kinds of attendee list for the event they created.
    WaitingListActivity
